     The Numbers Business Report

Am I Racist? (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,311,598Details
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Matt Walsh goes undercover in the world of DEI, hilariously skewering the absurdity of race hustlers. Prepare to be shocked by how far the grifters will go and how much further Matt Walsh will go to expose them.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,544,063 (36.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.71 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:100.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$3,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,517 opening theaters/1,600 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,019,166

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 13th, 2024 (Wide) by SDG Releasing
MPA Rating: PG-13 for strong language, thematic material, some sexual references and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2844 (cert #55097), 7/24/2024)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Agitprop
Plot point: Bigotry
Subgenre: Political Documentary
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Documentary
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Factual
Production/Financing Companies: The Daily Wire, SDG, Digital Astronaut
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
